arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the backup report plan.

creation_time.description: The time when the backup report plan was created.

deployment_status.description: The current status of the backup report plan deployment.

description.description: A brief description of the backup report plan.

id.description: The unique identifier for the backup report plan.

report_delivery_channel.description: Details about where and how the report is delivered, including formats and S3 bucket information.

report_setting.description: Configurations for the report settings, including accounts, frameworks, and report templates.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the backup report plan.
